title: Revenue assortment versus claimed social welfare
prompt: A vendor chooses a capacity-limited product set using a model that maximizes its expected revenue. A suggested marketing story says the method improves consumer welfare by expanding access, although utility, surplus, fairness, and service coverage do not appear in the model. Diagnose and rewrite the story faithfully.

model_specification.mechanism: The offered set reallocates modeled choice probabilities and revenue.

prohibited_inferences: Higher revenue implies higher consumer or social welfare
